Uses of Package
org.apache.paimon.flink

  • Packages that use org.apache.paimon.flink 
    Package Description
    org.apache.paimon.flink  
    org.apache.paimon.flink.action  
    org.apache.paimon.flink.source  
  • Classes in org.apache.paimon.flink used by org.apache.paimon.flink 
    Class and Description
    AbstractFlinkTableFactory
    Abstract paimon factory to create table source and table sink.
    DataTypeToLogicalType
    Convert DataType to LogicalType.
    FlinkCatalog
    Catalog for paimon.
    FlinkConnectorOptions.SplitAssignMode
    Split assign mode for StaticFileStoreSplitEnumerator.
    FlinkConnectorOptions.WatermarkEmitStrategy
    Watermark emit strategy for scan.
    FlinkGenericCatalog
    A Flink catalog that can also load non-Paimon tables.
    FlinkRowData
    Convert to Flink row data.
    ProjectedRowData
    An implementation of RowData which provides a projected view of the underlying RowData.
    Projection
    Projection represents a list of (possibly nested) indexes that can be used to project data types.
  • Classes in org.apache.paimon.flink used by org.apache.paimon.flink.action 
    Class and Description
    FlinkCatalog
    Catalog for paimon.
  • Classes in org.apache.paimon.flink used by org.apache.paimon.flink.source 
    Class and Description
    FlinkConnectorOptions.SplitAssignMode
    Split assign mode for StaticFileStoreSplitEnumerator.
